name: kerryback-skills

plugins.name: litdb
plugins.description: Personal literature + notes knowledge base: hybrid keyword+semantic search over your papers and notes, Zotero/Better BibTeX import, loose-PDF folder ingestion with full text, OpenAlex/Semantic Scholar discovery, and a citation graph. Local-first; the runtime installs into ~/.litdb on first use.

plugins.name: voiceover
plugins.description: Turn a PDF slide deck into a narrated MP4 video plus a transcript. Claude Code writes the per-slide narration; ElevenLabs voices it. Requires quarto and an ElevenLabs API key.

plugins.name: slides
plugins.description: Build a polished slide deck as a Quarto reveal.js presentation — HTML slides you render, present in a browser, and export to PDF, PowerPoint, or PNG.

plugins.name: finance-data
plugins.description: Fetch free financial, market, and economic data (prices, fundamentals, SEC filings, macro series, asset-pricing factors) from Yahoo, Stooq, SEC EDGAR, FRED, Ken French, FinnHub, FMP, and US Treasury, and save it as CSV.

plugins.name: critique
plugins.description: Critique and revise work produced by Claude. Spawns parallel reviewer agents, synthesizes findings, and applies revisions. Heavyweight — fans out multiple subagents.

description: Authoring and teaching skills for Claude Code: narrated video from slide decks, Quarto slide decks, free financial/economic data, and adversarial work review.
